name: get_invoice_status
description: Retrieves outstanding invoice details from the workshop's accounting system. Used when a customer calls asking about a bill, what work was done, or to arrange payment on a completed job.
requires: Accounting system integration: Xero (most common for Australian SMBs) or MYOB AccountRight
Customer lookup key: phone number or rego plate (must match what's stored in the accounting system)
el_call_timing: Invoke when customer says 'I got a bill', 'I want to pay my invoice', 'how much do I owe', or 'what work was done on my car'
notes: Xero OAuth2 is the primary integration path — requires a Connected App and periodic token refresh (Xero tokens expire every 30 min, refresh tokens last 60 days). The agent should never read out full invoice line items verbally — summarise: 'Your invoice is for $340 covering a logbook service completed on the 14th.' Then offer to SMS a payment link or full invoice PDF link.
